product: Refresh policies and EXPLAIN CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW for materialized views…
tagline: Refresh policies and the EXPLAIN CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW statement are now generally available for materialized views.
what_it_does: Refresh policies and the EXPLAIN CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW statement are now generally available for materialized views. Use refresh policies to control when Databricks performs incremental or full refresh, optimizing cost and predictability. Use EXPLAIN CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW to check whether a query can be incrementalized before defining the materialized view.
why_it_matters: Use refresh policies to control when Databricks performs incremental or full refresh, optimizing cost and predictability.

capabilities.title: Data sources that don't retain
capabilities.desc: Data sources that don't retain data history, such as Kafka.

capabilities.title: Ingest operations, such as queries
capabilities.desc: Ingest operations, such as queries that use Auto Loader to ingest data from cloud object storage.

capabilities.title: Any data source where you
capabilities.desc: Any data source where you plan to delete or archive data after processing but need to retain information in downstream tables.…

capabilities.title: Delta tables, including Unity Catalog
capabilities.desc: Delta tables, including Unity Catalog managed tables and external tables backed by Delta Lake.

key_takeaway: Refresh policies and the EXPLAIN CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW statement are now generally available for materialized views.
